evidence.claim: Expertise in PyTorch, LangChain, QLoRA, Fine-tuning LLMs, FAISS, Qdrant, Image Classification, scikit-learn, Feature Engineering, LoRA, BM25, NLP, LLMs, Weights & Biases, and Kubeflow
evidence.source_text: Skills: PyTorch (expert, 56mo, 44 endorsements); LangChain (expert, 36mo, 7 endorsements); QLoRA (expert, 87mo, 39 endorsements); Fine-tuning LLMs (expert, 74mo, 41 endorsements); FAISS (expert, 62mo, 33 endorsements); Qdrant (advanced, 51mo, 59 endorsements); Image Classification (advanced, 43mo, 2 endorsements); scikit-learn (expert, 88mo, 36 endorsements); Feature Engineering (intermediate, 30mo, 9 endorsements); LoRA (expert, 73mo, 2 endorsements); BM25 (expert, 55mo, 51 endorsements); NLP (expert, 50mo, 29 endorsements); LLMs (expert, 53mo, 40 endorsements); Weights & Biases (advanced, 45mo, 29 endorsements); Kubeflow (advanced, 41mo, 17 endorsements)

evidence.claim: Developed semantic search for 500K documents using sentence-transformers and FAISS, improving relevance by 35%
evidence.source_text: Developed a semantic search feature for an internal knowledge base of ~500K documents. Used sentence-transformers... with FAISS... Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup

evidence.claim: Improved revenue-per-search by 12% by evolving ranking layer from hand-tuned to learning-to-rank model
evidence.source_text: Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product... Final model improved revenue-per-search by 12%.

evidence.claim: Led team migration from keyword-search to embedding-based retrieval
evidence.source_text: Recently, I led the team that migrated our keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval.
Certifications: AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty (AWS, 2019)

evidence.claim: Prioritizes evaluation rigor and offline benchmarks for model deployment
evidence.source_text: I care a lot about evaluation rigor — too many teams ship models without offline benchmarks they trust.

evidence.claim: Values practical experience over purely academic background
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.
